title: RBI Issues Amendment Directions on 'Matters to be placed before the Boards of the Banks'
description: <cite index="50-3">Governance Amendment Directions replace the earlier 'seven broad themes' for Board agendas with principle-based guidance and consolidated Appendix lists specifying what must go to the Board for Commercial Banks, Small Finance Banks, Payments Banks and Local Area Banks, effective October 1, 2026</cite>.
